title: Tony van Roon-Werten
text: Home * People * Tony van Roon-Werten Tony van Roon-Werten DOCCC 2004 [1] Tony van Roon-Werten , a Dutch computer scientist, application manager and chess programmer. Tony is author of the chess program XiniX and was member of the Search and Games Group of the Maastricht University . The development of XiniX started in the mid 90, soon supported by tester and operator Elke van Roon .
